finding: TASK-RFT-0032 made git-governance.ts a thin facade, but the extracted implementation is a transitional compact carrier instead of semantically typed bounded modules.
expectedBehavior: Git governance commit, push, status, branch-queue, and evidence-boundary logic should live in readable typed modules that each stay below the line budget without compression.
evidenceOrRepro: packages/cli/src/commands/git-governance/implementation.ts created during TASK-RFT-0032 to preserve behavior while satisfying the immediate facade split and line-count gate.
followUp: Open a follow-up refactor card to expand implementation.ts into typed bounded modules, remove @ts-nocheck, and keep the git-governance extraction test green.
